changes.oldValue: Planning task 45ao85 is done. Build the actual ingestion: fetch subjects from Zooniverse Active Asteroids project, normalize to ActiveAsteroidsDaily type, populate active_asteroids_daily table. One entry per game date. Prerequisite for Carta narrative alignment.
changes.newValue:
Same infrastructure as Cloudspotting on Mars — public Zooniverse API, same cache table pattern. No credentials needed.

Blocked on `dmukp0` (Cloudspotting) completing first — that establishes the ingestion pattern and script template this one will reuse. No input needed from you until Cloudspotting is done.

snapshot.title: Science data ingestion: Active Asteroids cache pipeline
snapshot.description:
Same infrastructure as Cloudspotting on Mars — public Zooniverse API, same cache table pattern. No credentials needed.
